projects.name: ChronoMed
projects.description: PLACEHOLDER — replace with your real project story once scoped. Problem: medication adherence drops when dosing schedules ignore a patient's natural circadian rhythm. Approach: a dispenser that times doses against a circadian model rather than a fixed clock, with a companion app for caregivers. Outcome: pending — this is a candidate FYP concept, not yet built.
